agentPage.title: Talk to Agent
agentPage.subtitle: Ask about our products, solutions, methodology, or anything else.
agentPage.initialMessage: Hello! I'm the OWL Intelligence assistant. I can help you understand our products (FWBM and FuzzyOwl), explore use cases relevant to your institution, and find the right next step. How can I help you today?
agentPage.errorMessage: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again or contact us directly.

investorsPage.title: Investors & Partners
investorsPage.section1Body: We do not see OWL Intelligence merely as a technology venture. We see it as a structure built to transform research knowledge into next-generation decision infrastructure. For that reason, growth is not just about commercial expansion for us. Growth means deepening through the right partnerships, strengthening through the right capital, and opening new fields of value through meaningful collaboration. From the very beginning, our core belief has been clear: when reliable field data meets AI-powered decision systems, institutions gain the ability to read the world more accurately, learn faster, and act with greater confidence.
investorsPage.section2Body: For many years, the research industry operated largely through periodic reports, delayed insights, and limited integration into real decision processes. That model is no longer enough. The world is now faster, more fragile, and more layered. Institutions do not only need data; they need systems that can process it continuously, interpret it meaningfully, and connect it directly to decision-making. This is why we believe the boundaries of research are being redefined. What is needed today is not just research, but a living information infrastructure that can be updated, queried, and translated into action. OWL Intelligence is built within that shift.
investorsPage.section3Title: A New Threshold in the Research Market
investorsPage.section3Body: The research market is entering a new threshold. Institutions no longer want to know only what happened. They also want to understand what is changing, what is emerging, which segments are under pressure, and which decisions may create risk or opportunity. This new demand requires a much stronger bridge between traditional research practice and the new generation of analytics and AI systems. At OWL, that is precisely where we position ourselves. Our focus is to turn reliable field-based data into a scalable, continuously operating intelligence layer that connects directly to institutional decision workflows.
investorsPage.section4Body: We do not define partnership as financial support alone, nor as a transactional business relationship. To us, partnership means thinking together, building together, and scaling together. As we grow our products, we believe strategic perspective, sectoral reach, institutional experience, and international networks matter just as much as capital. That is why we approach our relationships with investors, strategic partners, technology collaborators, and institutional stakeholders as part of a long-term co-building process. The strongest organizations are not built only through strong ideas, but also through the right people and a shared sense of direction.
investorsPage.section5Body: Because data alone is no longer enough. The real issue is whether data can be used in a timely, reliable, and decision-ready way. OWL Intelligence is building a structure that combines the rigor of research methodology with the speed of modern technology. That makes us more than a research company and more than a software product. We are building a new operational layer between research and decision-making. Institutions today require insights that are more frequent, more explainable, more defensible, and more actionable. This is exactly where OWL’s growth opportunity begins.
investorsPage.section6Body: Our vision is not limited to Türkiye. We aim to grow the field-based, technology-enabled model we are building here into a decision-intelligence infrastructure that can scale across Europe. At EU scale, we see substantial demand in areas such as data reliability, institutional resilience, consumer behavior, economic pressure, social vulnerability, and decision support systems. OWL Intelligence is designed to combine a deep understanding of local realities with the ability to productize that understanding to international standards. Our scaling vision is not only geographical. It is also about making methodological rigor and technological capability reproducible across markets.
investorsPage.section7Body: We are focused less on fast and superficial expansion, and more on building durable and meaningful value. The growth journey of OWL Intelligence is being built on reliable data, strong methodology, robust product architecture, and aligned partnerships. For that reason, we see our relationships with investors, institutional partners, technology stakeholders, and international collaborators not simply as immediate opportunities, but as part of building the structure of the future. We value engaging with those who believe in building, thinking, and growing together over the long term.
investorsPage.section8Body: At a moment when the research world is being reshaped and institutions need smarter, more continuous systems, OWL Intelligence aims to open a new path. If you believe in the future of research, the transformation of decision infrastructure, and the next-generation use of reliable data, we would be glad to connect. Some structures are not simply launched; they are built and grown through the right partnerships.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.lead: Our research and insight models that connect field data, advanced analytics, and AI to decision workflows.
productsPage.fwbmP1: FWBM is positioned as a decision-grade financial well-being intelligence product for Türkiye. With weekly-updated dashboards, AI-assisted querying, recurring analytics, and integrated macro data, it makes household financial stress and resilience continuously measurable.
productsPage.fwbmP2: It surfaces the demand-side reality macro indicators miss: income–expenditure balance, basic needs pressure, borrowing and savings capacity, expectations, and stress dynamics. With nationwide coverage and a quality-control-first field pipeline, it supports targeting, early-warning, and decision support for public, private, and civil-society actors.
productsPage.fuzzyowlP1: FuzzyOWL is a premium causal insight and strategy platform built on Fuzzy Cognitive Mapping. It helps organizations move beyond “what people say” to understand what drives what—mapping the structure behind perception and decision-making.
productsPage.fuzzyowlP2: AI-assisted clustering and interpretation identify driver variables, fragile points, and leverage areas. Scenario simulation lets teams test strategic change before acting, enabling clearer prioritization and more defensible decisions in complex environments.
productsPage.fuzzyowlTitle: Fuzzy Cognitive Mapping for Strategic Decision-Making
productsPage.fuzzyowlLead: Model complex systems, simulate strategic decisions, and visualize outcomes. Turn expert knowledge into actionable, decision-ready insight.
productsPage.fuzzyowlHow1Body: Identify the key factors, variables, and concepts that influence your strategic question.
productsPage.fuzzyowlHow2Body: Draw causal connections between concepts with fuzzy weights (-1 to +1) representing influence strength and direction.
productsPage.fuzzyowlHow3Body: Activate scenarios by changing concept values and observe how effects propagate through the system.
productsPage.fuzzyowlHow4Body: Compare outcomes, identify leverage points, and make data-informed strategic decisions.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature1Body: Model complex systems as interconnected concepts with weighted causal relationships—capturing expert knowledge in a computable structure.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature2Body: Run what-if scenarios by adjusting concept values and observing how changes propagate through the system.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature3Body: Explore your maps with interactive graph views—highlighting pathways to understand complex relationships.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature4Body: Use AI to suggest missing relationships, identify feedback loops, and refine map structure.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature5Body: Generate reports with scenario comparisons, sensitivity analyses, and strategic recommendations.
productsPage.fuzzyowlFeature6Body: A structured method for eliciting and encoding domain expertise into decision-support models.
productsPage.fuzzyowlCtaHeading: Ready to model your next strategic decision?
productsPage.fuzzyowlCtaBody: Playground access is coming soon. In the meantime, explore the platform overview or get in touch with our team.
productsPage.econimpactP1: EconImpact is positioned as a product developed under OWL Intelligence to make economic impact measurement faster, more standardized, and more accessible for institutions. It helps organizations make their total contribution visible—not only through direct activity, but also through wider channels such as supply chains, employment, and income effects.
productsPage.econimpactP2: The product aims to turn classical economic impact studies from a consultancy-only service into a digital workflow. Institutional users register on the platform, upload the required inputs, and generate an impact report through dashboards and downloadable outputs. Results are structured around total output, value added, labor income, and employment, and can be decomposed into direct, indirect, and induced effects—supporting investor communications, corporate storytelling, public affairs, and strategic decision-making.

meta.title: OWL Intelligence — Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
meta.description: Decision-support products for institutions combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI.

hero.headline: Advanced Analytics Grounded in Field Data
hero.body: OWL Intelligence develops decision-support products for institutions by combining validated field data, structured analytics, and AI governed within a clear oversight framework.
hero.metric1Label: Provinces of field coverage across Turkey
hero.metric3Label: AI-supported decision products in the ecosystem

businessSpeed.heading: Business moves faster than traditional data
businessSpeed.statement1: Static measurement cannot keep pace with changing conditions.
businessSpeed.statement3: Better decisions require higher-frequency, ground-level evidence.

value.heading: Measurement, analytics, and AI in one decision-support layer
value.body: OWL Intelligence brings measurement, analytics, and AI together within a single decision-support layer. It continuously monitors real-world conditions, processes emerging signals, and makes them usable for institutional contexts.
value.col1Body: Continuously monitors real-world conditions through structured fieldwork and validated data pipelines.
value.col2Body: Transforms raw signals into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
value.col3Body: Governed AI layers interpret findings, explain patterns, and deliver decision-ready intelligence.

productEcosystem.heading: An integrated structure that turns field data into stronger decisions
productEcosystem.intro: Our product ecosystem provides an integrated structure that turns field data into stronger measurement, analysis, and decision support.
productEcosystem.fwbmDescriptor: Next-generation household financial resilience measurement at institutional scale.
productEcosystem.fuzzyowlDescriptor: Makes visible which variables shape decisions, how they influence each other, and how interventions affect the system as a whole.
productEcosystem.econimpactDescriptor: Measures the economic footprint of companies through deterministic value creation models and AI-based reporting. Delivered as a SaaS platform with expert support for custom institutional reporting.

intelligenceLayer.heading: Eight integrated stages from raw signal to institutional decision
intelligenceLayer.step01Body: Each product begins with an embedded methodology that defines what is measured and how it is measured.
intelligenceLayer.step02Body: A regular, structured, and highly reliable flow of real-world data is generated through fieldwork.
intelligenceLayer.step03Body: The AuditorAI layer subjects the data to quality, consistency, and validation checks, creating a fully validated foundation.
intelligenceLayer.step04Body: Validated field data is brought together with integrated databases and relevant external data sources within a single data structure.
intelligenceLayer.step05Body: The ClassifyAI layer organizes the data into meaningful categories, labels it, and prepares it for analysis.
intelligenceLayer.step06Body: Deterministic computation engines consistently generate indicators, scores, segments, and decision rules.
intelligenceLayer.step07Body: Processed data becomes trackable, comparable, and ready for institutional use through live dashboards.
intelligenceLayer.step08Body: Governed AI analysis assistants such as Monet and FuzzyOwl interpret findings, explain patterns, and complete the analytical layer.

sectors.heading: Built for institutions that operate at complexity
sectors.context: Nine sectors. One coherent intelligence infrastructure.

whyOwl.heading:
Not a research firm.

An intelligence infrastructure.
whyOwl.intro: Unlike conventional research firms, OWL Intelligence does not leave data confined to reports; it turns data into productized analytics and decision support. With more than 15 years of experience, a field network spanning all 81 provinces of Turkey, and in-house technology capabilities, it transforms research into an infrastructure that operates at institutional scale.
whyOwl.diff1Body: Drawing on deep methodological expertise shaped by national and international projects, our team specializes in quantitative, qualitative, mixed, and experimental methods.
whyOwl.diff2Body: OWL Intelligence does not simply collect data; it transforms it into analytical structures that connect directly to decision-making processes.
whyOwl.diff3Body: Our technology and software infrastructure is developed in-house and designed with a product logic.

founders.heading: It was founded not to copy what already exists, but to build what is missing.

beyza.quote: We did not found OWL simply to build technology; we founded it to bring decision-making into the reality of our time.
beyza.name: Beyza Polat

saygin.quote: The knowledge was already there; fragmented, delayed, and underused. OWL began with the idea of turning it into a working infrastructure.
saygin.name: Saygın Vedat Alkurt

partnerships.heading: We work with stakeholders who want to build and grow together.
partnerships.body: Open to institutional partnership, strategic capital, and aligned long-horizon collaboration.

aboutPage.description: Building AI-powered intelligence products grounded in authentic field data.
aboutPage.standout: Verified field data, shaped into decision-ready intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyOne: OWL Intelligence is a UK-based technology and research company, with R&D and operations in Turkey including Kadir Has Teknopark, developing commercial AI products that transform real-world field data into actionable business intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyTwo: We operate at the intersection of rigorous research methodology and modern artificial intelligence.
aboutPage.bodyThree: Our flagship product, FWBM, continuously measures household-level financial stress and resilience through authentic field surveys, weekly-updated dashboards, AI-assisted querying, and integrated macro data. Our second product, FuzzyOwl, brings Fuzzy Cognitive Mapping to strategic decision-making, enabling organizations to model complex systems and simulate scenarios. EconImpact delivers self-administered, automated economic impact reports for institutions and companies.
aboutPage.bodyFour: We believe that the most valuable intelligence comes from verified human data, not scraped feeds or synthetic estimates. Our technology stack is designed to preserve this authenticity while making the insights accessible, interactive, and commercially actionable.
aboutPage.indicatorOne: More than 15 years in social and economic research
aboutPage.indicatorTwo: Field capacity in 81 provinces and all districts across Turkey
aboutPage.indicatorThree: Trusted relationships across sectors, academia, and international organizations

foundersPage.title: The People Behind OWL Intelligence
foundersPage.description: OWL Intelligence is built by founders combining applied economics, sociology, field research, and data-driven strategy.

beyza.name: Beyza Polat
beyza.bioOne: Beyza Polat is the founder and managing director of SEAL Consulting. She is an economist with expertise in analyzing large-scale datasets and developing and implementing quantitative research tools that support decision-making in public and private enterprises.
beyza.bioTwo: Since 2014, she has worked as a team leader and/or consultant on joint projects with institutions including the Ministry of Industry and Technology, Ministry of Trade, the World Bank, the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees, the United Nations Development Programme, the Turkish Employment Agency, and SAS Institute.
beyza.bioThree: She has experience in quantitative impact evaluation, programme evaluation, regional economic analysis, labour market assessment, and sectoral economic analysis. She also provides executive training to public institutions and the private sector on data analytics and impact evaluation. She previously served as a faculty member in the Department of Economics at Ozyegin University, where she taught Statistics, Econometrics, and Applied Microeconometrics, and has also taught undergraduate and graduate courses at Bilkent University and LSE. Beyza holds a bachelor's degree in Business Administration from Bilkent University and graduate degrees in Economics from Bilkent University and the London School of Economics and Political Science.

saygin.name: Saygın Vedat Alkurt
saygin.bioOne: With over 15+ years of interdisciplinary research experience, he has contributed to and led numerous academic, public, and civil society projects across Turkey, particularly in fields such as political sociology, communication, youth studies, and strategic consultancy. He currently serves as the General Director of Adhoc Research and Consultancy, which he co-founded, and as the Chairperson of CORE Institute (Collective Research Association), an NGO focusing on generational change, urban mobility, and socio-cultural transformation.
saygin.bioTwo: He is also a lecturer at Kadir Has University's Faculty of Communication and sits on the Advisory Board of the Department of Political Science and Public Administration at the same university.
saygin.bioThree: Alkurt's portfolio spans research design, qualitative and quantitative analysis, monitoring and evaluation, and data-driven policy consulting for international organizations such as UNDP, European Union institutions, and TUBITAK. He is known for bridging data and narrative, combining robust field methodologies with participatory approaches to produce actionable insights for social impact. Throughout his career, he has maintained a strong focus on public interest research and the intersection of societal behavior, governance, and policy.

footer.description: AI-powered intelligence products grounded in authentic field data.

contact.error: We could not send your message right now. Please try again or email info@owlintelligence.co.uk.

technologyPage.heroLead: At OWL Intelligence, technology is not an add-on to research. It is the core infrastructure behind how we collect, validate, structure, analyze, and activate data. We bring together advanced AI systems, cloud-based architecture, trusted external databases, and production-ready software tools to turn raw information into reliable intelligence.

sections.aiPartnersBody: On the AI side, we work with leading models and tools from globally trusted technology partners such as OpenAI, Google Gemini, and Anthropic. These systems support analysis, classification, summarization, anomaly detection, data interpretation, and intelligent interface design across our workflow.
sections.engineeringBody: On the product and engineering side, we build secure, flexible, and scalable platforms using modern technologies such as Supabase, Next.js, Railway, and Sanity. This stack allows us to deliver high-performance digital products that are both operationally robust and ready for institutional use.
sections.sourcesBody: Our systems are designed to combine proprietary field data with trusted national and international sources such as the IMF, CBRT (TCMB), TurkStat (TÜİK), the World Bank, Eurostat, and the OECD. This enables us to provide insights that are not only data-driven, but also contextual, comparable, and decision-ready.

capabilities.heading: Technology & AI
capabilities.lead: Our technology stack combines rigorous field research methodology with advanced AI to deliver intelligence products that are grounded, transparent, and commercially valuable.

authenticFieldData.title: Authentic Field Data
authenticFieldData.description: Our foundation is real-world field research — structured surveys, interviews, and observational data collected across Turkiye and beyond. Unlike scraped or synthetic data, our datasets reflect verified human behavior and sentiment.

proprietaryMethodology.title: Proprietary Methodology (FWBM)
proprietaryMethodology.description: The Field-Weighted Barometer Model (FWBM) uses a proprietary weighting methodology that adjusts for demographic representation, regional variation, and temporal consistency — ensuring statistically robust, commercially relevant indicators.

aiPoweredAnalysis.title: AI-Powered Analysis (Monet)
aiPoweredAnalysis.description: Our AI layer (Monet) interprets complex datasets, detects emerging trends, generates natural-language insights, and powers our interactive agent — making intelligence accessible to decision-makers at every level.

fuzzyCognitiveMapping.title: Fuzzy Cognitive Mapping (FuzzyOwl)
fuzzyCognitiveMapping.description: FuzzyOwl applies Fuzzy Cognitive Map (FCM) theory to model complex causal systems. This mathematical framework captures expert knowledge as weighted directed graphs and supports scenario simulation for strategic planning.

dataIntegrityGovernance.title: Data Integrity & Governance
dataIntegrityGovernance.description: We maintain rigorous data governance — from collection protocols and quality assurance to secure storage and compliant processing. Our data pipeline is designed for auditability and transparency.

multiLanguageIntelligence.title: Multi-Language Intelligence
multiLanguageIntelligence.description: Our platform operates natively in English and Turkish, with content, analysis, and AI interactions available in both languages — supporting cross-market intelligence for international stakeholders.

methodology.heading: Our Research Methodology
methodology.lead: OWL Intelligence products are built on a multi-stage research process that ensures data quality, statistical validity, and commercial relevance at every step.

design.title: Design
design.desc: Survey and research design with sampling strategy

collect.desc: Field data collection with quality controls
